name: Telehealth Visit Intake
description: Telehealth visit intake for clinical staff conducting pre-visit intake for a telehealth encounter. Evaluates the chief complaint, technology readiness, the appropriateness of telehealth for the presenting concern, patient consent, and clinical documentation requirements to produce a telehealth intake profile with visit appropriateness assessment and pre-visit checklist. Not medical advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
